Subject: Book changes
Message:
Bill,

We really do not need to delete the books.  We would like to keep them available for possible future trading.  Essentially, additional books are set up for the sole purpose of using them in the future when needed.  At that time, we will assign a trader name to the book.  This will mean that the book is ready to go in GCP as well as ERMS.  Let me know if you have any questions.

John
